title: Certificate Transparency & OCSP Stapling
description: Implement Certificate Transparency mechanisms for public logging of SSL/TLS certificates. Optimize certificate revocation checks using OCSP Stapling to reduce browser-side latency. Evaluate the combined security and performance benefits of Certificate Transparency and OCSP Stapling.
objectives: Implement Certificate Transparency mechanisms for public logging of SSL/TLS certificates.
Optimize certificate revocation checks using OCSP Stapling to reduce browser-side latency.
Evaluate the combined security and performance benefits of Certificate Transparency and OCSP Stapling.
